title: 1 step DFU - Settings/Update tab both on the lates
scenario: Verify the "Up to date" display on Fab/Settings/SW update when app starts with latest Osprey, EB, and CC versions in a 1-step DFU scenario.
steps: Launch the app with Osprey, EB, and CC all on the latest versions.
Navigate to Fab > Settings > SW update.
expected: The screen shows "Up to date" with no update available. The design for this 1-step DFU scenario should be verified.
